heading: Payments from CIARDS fund for portions of certain Civil Service Retirement System annuities
label: 2144 Payments from CIARDS fund for portions of certain Civil Service Retirement System annuities
text: The amount of the increase in any annuity that results from the application of , if and when such increase is based on an individual’s overseas service as an employee of the Central Intelligence Agency, shall be paid from the fund.section 3518 of this title
